jobs.title: Digital Platforms Manager
jobs.description: We are looking for a talented Digital Platforms Manager to lead the strategy and development of our travel app at Explora Journeys. Join us in redefining luxury ocean travel and make a significant impact in the luxury hospitality industry.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione - Siamo alla ricerca di un talentuoso Responsabile Piattaforme Digitali per guidare la strategia e lo sviluppo della nostra app di viaggio presso Explora Journeys - Unisciti a noi per ridefinire il lusso dei viaggi oceanici - Fai un impatto significativo nel settore dell'ospitalità di lusso
descriptionByLocale.en: We are looking for a talented Digital Platforms Manager to lead the strategy and development of our travel app at Explora Journeys. Join us in redefining luxury ocean travel and make a significant impact in the luxury hospitality industry.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung - Wir suchen einen talentierten Digital Platforms Manager, um die Strategie und Entwicklung unserer Reise-App bei Explora Journeys zu leiten - Treten Sie uns bei und definieren Sie Luxus-Ozeanreisen neu - Machen Sie einen erheblichen Einfluss in der Luxushotellerie
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description - Nous recherchons un talentueux Responsable des Plateformes Numériques pour diriger la stratégie et le développement de notre application de voyage chez Explora Journeys - Rejoignez-nous pour redéfinir le voyage océanique de luxe - Faites un impact significatif dans l'industrie de l'hôtellerie de luxe

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver compelling brand narratives and campaigns that resonate with our guests. Join us in redefining luxury ocean travel!

jobs.title: Shore Excursions Product Development Manager

titleByLocale.it: Responsabile Sviluppo Prodotti Escursioni a Terra

jobs.description: Join our team as a Shore Excursions Product Development Manager, where you will lead the creation of innovative tour products, negotiate contracts, and enhance guest satisfaction. If you have a passion for travel and a knack for collaboration, we want to hear from you!

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione - Unisciti al nostro team come Responsabile Sviluppo Prodotti Escursioni a Terra, dove guiderai la creazione di prodotti turistici innovativi, negozierai contratti e migliorerai la soddisfazione degli ospiti - Se hai una passione per i viaggi e una propensione per la collaborazione, vogliamo sentirti!
descriptionByLocale.en: Join our team as a Shore Excursions Product Development Manager, where you will lead the creation of innovative tour products, negotiate contracts, and enhance guest satisfaction. If you have a passion for travel and a knack for collaboration, we want to hear from you!
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung - Treten Sie unserem Team als Produktentwicklungsmanager für Landausflüge bei, wo Sie die Entwicklung innovativer Tourenprodukte leiten, Verträge aushandeln und die Gästezufriedenheit verbessern - Wenn Sie eine Leidenschaft für Reisen und ein Talent für Zusammenarbeit haben, möchten wir von Ihnen hören!
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description - Rejoignez notre équipe en tant que Responsable Développement Produits Excursions Terrestres, où vous dirigerez la création de produits touristiques innovants, négocierez des contrats et améliorerez la satisfaction des clients - Si vous avez une passion pour les voyages et un talent pour la collaboration, nous voulons avoir de vos nouvelles !

jobs.title: Digital Acquisition Manager
jobs.description: Are you experienced in driving digital marketing strategies? Join us as a Senior Digital Acquisition Manager to lead innovative campaigns, optimize performance, and enhance customer engagement across multiple channels. Your expertise will help shape our digital landscape and drive direct sales growth. Apply now!

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione - Hai esperienza nella gestione di strategie di marketing digitale? - Unisciti a noi come Senior Digital Acquisition Manager per guidare campagne innovative, ottimizzare le performance e migliorare l'engagement dei clienti su più canali - La tua esperienza aiuterà a plasmare il nostro panorama digitale e a incrementare le vendite dirette
descriptionByLocale.en: Are you experienced in driving digital marketing strategies? Join us as a Senior Digital Acquisition Manager to lead innovative campaigns, optimize performance, and enhance customer engagement across multiple channels. Your expertise will help shape our digital landscape and drive direct sales growth. Apply now!
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung - Haben Sie Erfahrung in der Gestaltung von Digitalmarketing-Strategien? - Treten Sie uns als Senior Digital Acquisition Manager bei, um innovative Kampagnen zu leiten, die Leistung zu optimieren und die Kundenbindung über mehrere Kanäle hinweg zu verbessern - Ihre Expertise wird helfen, unsere digitale Landschaft zu gestalten und den direkten Verkaufswachstum zu steigern - Bewerben Sie sich jetzt!
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description - Avez-vous de l'expérience dans la gestion de stratégies de marketing numérique? - Rejoignez-nous en tant que Senior Digital Acquisition Manager pour diriger des campagnes innovantes, optimiser les performances et améliorer l'engagement des clients sur plusieurs canaux - Votre expertise aidera à façonner notre paysage numérique et à stimuler la croissance des ventes directes - Postulez maintenant!

titleByLocale.it: Responsabile Digital Analytics Strategy, Testing e CRO
titleByLocale.en: Digital Analytics Strategy, Testing and CRO Manager
titleByLocale.de: Strategie-, Test- und CRO-Manager für digitale Analysen
titleByLocale.fr: Responsable de la stratégie, des tests et de l'analyse numérique

jobs.description: Are you experienced in driving D2C growth through data-driven experimentation? Join us as a Digital Analytics Strategy, Testing and CRO Manager to optimize our direct digital channels and maximize conversion rates. Be part of a team that values diverse perspectives and fosters an inclusive environment.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione - Hai esperienza nel guidare la crescita D2C attraverso l'esperimentazione basata sui dati? - Unisciti a noi come Digital Analytics Strategy, Testing and CRO Manager per ottimizzare i nostri canali digitali diretti e massimizzare i tassi di conversione - Fai parte di un team che valorizza le diverse prospettive e promuove un ambiente inclusivo
descriptionByLocale.en: Are you experienced in driving D2C growth through data-driven experimentation? Join us as a Digital Analytics Strategy, Testing and CRO Manager to optimize our direct digital channels and maximize conversion rates. descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung - Haben Sie Erfahrung in der Steuerung des D2C-Wachstums durch datengesteuerte Experimente? - Treten Sie uns als Digital Analytics Strategy, Testing and CRO Manager bei, um unsere direkten digitalen Kanäle zu optimieren und die Conversion-Raten zu maximieren - Seien Sie Teil eines Teams, das unterschiedliche Perspektiven schätzt und eine inklusive Umgebung fördert
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description - Avez-vous de l'expérience dans la stimulation de la croissance D2C grâce à l'expérimentation basée sur les données? - Rejoignez-nous en tant que Digital Analytics Strategy, Testing and CRO Manager pour optimiser nos canaux numériques directs et maximiser les taux de conversion - Faites partie d'une équipe qui valorise les perspectives diverses et favorise un environnement inclusif

jobs.title: Mobile App Product Specialist

titleByLocale.it: Specialista di prodotto per app mobili

jobs.description: Are you experienced in optimizing mobile user journeys? Join our team as a Mobile App Product Specialist and drive product-led initiatives to enhance digital guest experiences. Your analytical mindset and commercial acumen will be key in maximizing conversion rates and shaping the future of our mobile applications.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione - Hai esperienza nell'ottimizzazione dei percorsi degli utenti mobili? - Unisciti al nostro team come Specialista di prodotto per app mobili - Guida iniziative guidate dal prodotto per migliorare le esperienze digitali degli ospiti - La tua mentalità analitica e il tuo acume commerciale saranno fondamentali - Massimizza i tassi di conversione - Plasmare il futuro delle nostre applicazioni mobili
descriptionByLocale.en: Are you experienced in optimizing mobile user journeys? Join our team as a Mobile App Product Specialist and drive product-led initiatives to enhance digital guest experiences. Your analytical mindset and commercial acumen will be key in maximizing conversion rates and shaping the future of our mobile applications.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung - Haben Sie Erfahrung in der Optimierung von mobilen Benutzerpfaden? - Treten Sie unserem Team als Mobile App Product Specialist bei - Leiten Sie produktgeführte Initiativen, um digitale Gasterlebnisse zu verbessern - Ihr analytischer Geist und Ihr kommerzielles Gespür werden entscheidend sein - Maximieren Sie die Konversionsraten - Gestalten Sie die Zukunft unserer mobilen Anwendungen
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description - Avez-vous de l'expérience dans l'optimisation des parcours utilisateurs mobiles? - Rejoignez notre équipe en tant que Spécialiste des produits d'applications mobiles - Dirigez des initiatives axées sur le produit pour améliorer les expériences numériques des invités - Votre esprit analytique et votre perspicacité commerciale seront essentiels - Maximisez les taux de conversion - Façonnez l'avenir de nos applications mobiles

jobs.source: MSC Group Dedicated Parser (Phenom careers portal)

it: Esperienza nell'ottimizzazione dei percorsi degli utenti mobili
Capacità di guidare iniziative guidate dal prodotto
Competenze nella massimizzazione dei tassi di conversione
Conoscenza delle metriche di performance digitale
de: Erfahrung in der Optimierung von mobilen Benutzerpfaden
fr: Expérience dans l'optimisation des parcours utilisateurs mobiles
Capacité à diriger des initiatives axées sur le produit

Connaissance des métriques de performance numérique

jobs.title: Vice President Global SPA and Wellness

titleByLocale.it: Vice President Global SPA e Benessere
titleByLocale.en: Vice President Global SPA and Wellness
titleByLocale.de: Vice President Global SPA und Wellness
titleByLocale.fr: Vice Président Global SPA et Bien-être

jobs.description: Are you experienced in leading global SPA and wellness strategies? Join us as the Vice President Global SPA and Wellness, where you will drive luxury wellness standards and elevate guest satisfaction across our cruise division. Your expertise will shape the future of wellness at MSC Cruises!

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Hai esperienza nella gestione di strategie globali per SPA e benessere? Unisciti a noi come Vice President Global SPA e Wellness, dove guiderai gli standard di benessere di lusso e eleverai la soddisfazione degli ospiti nella nostra divisione crociere. La tua esperienza plasmerà il futuro del benessere su MSC Crociere!
descriptionByLocale.en: Are you experienced in leading global SPA and wellness strategies? Join us as the Vice President Global SPA and Wellness, where you will drive luxury wellness standards and elevate guest satisfaction across our cruise division. Your expertise will shape the future of wellness at MSC Cruises!
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Haben Sie Erfahrung in der Leitung globaler SPA- und Wellness-Strategien? Treten Sie uns als Vice President Global SPA und Wellness bei, wo Sie Luxus-Wellness-Standards vorantreiben und die Zufriedenheit der Gäste in unserer Kreuzfahrtdivision erhöhen werden. Ihre Expertise wird die Zukunft des Wellness bei MSC Kreuzfahrten gestalten!
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description Avez-vous de l'expérience dans la gestion de stratégies globales de SPA et de bien-être ? Rejoignez-nous en tant que Vice Président Global SPA et Bien-être, où vous piloterez les normes de bien-être de luxe et élèverez la satisfaction des clients dans notre division croisières. Votre expertise façonnera l'avenir du bien-être chez MSC Croisières !

jobs.title: Head of Learning, Development and Talent Management

titleByLocale.it: Responsabile Formazione, Sviluppo e Gestione del Talento
titleByLocale.en: Head of Learning, Development and Talent Management
titleByLocale.fr: Responsable de l'Apprentissage, du Développement et de la Gestion des Talents

jobs.description: We are looking for a Head of Learning & Development and Talent Management to define and lead the global strategy for Learning and Development across shipboard and shore-based employees. This role focuses on building operational and service capabilities through structured training and leadership development.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione - Siamo alla ricerca di un Responsabile Formazione e Sviluppo e Gestione del Talento per definire e guidare la strategia globale per la Formazione e lo Sviluppo tra i dipendenti a bordo e a terra - Questo ruolo si concentra sullo sviluppo delle capacità operative e di servizio attraverso la formazione strutturata e lo sviluppo della leadership
descriptionByLocale.en: We are looking for a Head of Learning & Development and Talent Management to define and lead the global strategy for Learning and Development across shipboard and shore-based employees. This role focuses on building operational and service capabilities through structured training and leadership development.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung - Wir suchen einen Leiter für Lernen und Entwicklung sowie Talentmanagement, um die globale Strategie für Lernen und Entwicklung für Mitarbeiter an Bord und an Land zu definieren und zu leiten - Diese Rolle konzentriert sich auf den Aufbau von operativen und serviceorientierten Fähigkeiten durch strukturierte Schulungen und Führungskräfteentwicklung
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description - Nous recherchons un Responsable de l'Apprentissage et du Développement et de la Gestion des Talents pour définir et diriger la stratégie mondiale pour l'Apprentissage et le Développement parmi les employés à bord et à terre - Ce rôle se concentre sur le développement des capacités opérationnelles et de service grâce à une formation structurée et au développement du leadership

jobs.source: MSC Group Dedicated Parser (Phenom careers portal)
